summary: SessionCache now mutates its Dictionary without the SemaphoreSlim, and SessionService fans the cache out across concurrent Task.WhenAll loads.

comments.body: Removing the SemaphoreSlim leaves the underlying Dictionary unsynchronized while SessionService.ResolveManyAsync now fans GetOrCreateAsync out across concurrent tasks. The read-then-write race can drop entries or throw under concurrent invocation. Restore the lock or switch to ConcurrentDictionary.
